brand.name: Fume Coworking
brand.tagline: Your Home Office, Away From Home

sections.name: Animated Hero
sections.description: Full-screen hero with animated rotating text 'Away From Home', 'Near You', 'For Your Team', 'For Your Startup', 'Every Workday'. Background image with dark overlay gradient. Two CTA buttons: Book a Tour, View Workspaces.

sections.name: Locations Preview
sections.description: Grid of 2 location cards showing Delhi and Gurgaon with images, seat count (250 each), connectivity status

sections.name: Pricing Preview
sections.description: Creative pricing cards showcasing workspace options

sections.name: Amenities Preview
sections.description: Feature section with hover effects showing amenities

sections.name: CTA Section
sections.description: Gradient background (black to blue-950), 'Ready to Experience Fume?' heading with Book a Tour and Contact Us buttons

pages.name: Locations
pages.description: Details about 2 coworking spaces - Delhi (NSP) and Gurgaon (Udyog Vihar). Each with features list, seat count, connectivity

pages.name: Workspaces
pages.description: Pricing/workspace cards with tabs: All, Hourly, Monthly. 7 workspace types: Day Pass (₹499/day), Open Dedicated (₹8000/mo), Cubicle (₹12000/mo), Private Cabin (₹35000/mo), Meeting Room (₹500/hr), Conference Room (₹1500/hr), Virtual Office (₹2000/mo)

pages.name: Amenities
pages.description: Grid of 10 amenities with icons: High-Speed WiFi, Free Coffee, Meeting Rooms, 24/7 Access, Parking, Printer, Reception, Security, Kitchen, Lockers

components.name: AnimatedHero
components.description: Hero section with Framer Motion animations, rotating text, background image with gradient overlay

components.name: FeatureSectionWithHoverEffects
components.description: Grid of features with hover animation effects

components.name: CreativePricing
components.description: Pricing cards with brutalist design, emoji icons, shadow effects on hover

components.name: Card
components.description: shadcn/ui Card component with dark theme styling

components.name: Button
components.description: shadcn/ui Button with multiple variants (default, outline, ghost)

key_features: Dark theme primary with light mode support
Tailwind CSS v4 with OKLCH colors
prompt:
Create a premium coworking space website called 'Fume Coworking' with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Use a dark theme with black and blue colors (#18181b background, #1e40af primary blue). Include:

1. ANIMATED HERO: Full-screen hero with rotating text animation (Away From Home, Near You, For Your Team, For Your Startup, Every Workday) using Framer Motion, background image with gradient overlay

2. LOCATIONS: Two locations in Delhi (Netaji Subhash Palace) and Gurgaon (Udyog Vihar), each with 250 seats, excellent connectivity, showing location image, address, and features

3. WORKSPACES: 7 workspace types displayed in cards with tabs (All/Hourly/Monthly): Day Pass ₹499/day, Dedicated Desk ₹8000/mo, Cubicle ₹12000/mo, Private Cabin ₹35000/mo, Meeting Room ₹500/hr, Conference Room ₹1500/hr, Virtual Office ₹2000/mo. Use brutalist card design with emoji icons and shadow hover effects

4. AMENITIES: Grid of 10 amenities (WiFi, Coffee, Meeting Rooms, 24/7 Access, Parking, Printer, Reception, Security, Kitchen, Lockers) with hover effects

5. HEADER: Sticky with blur, logo, navigation links (Locations, Workspaces, Amenities, Events, Contact), location indicator, Book Now button

6. FOOTER: 4-column layout with logo/tagline, location links, workspace links, contact info

Use Inter font, OKLCH color system, shadcn/ui components, and ensure fully responsive design.
